UserPromptSubmit.matcher: (?i)\b(add|create|build|implement|i want|let's add|can we add|we should add|new feature|new module|new page|new endpoint|new entity|new service|new component|new screen|new functionality|new capability|integrate|introduce|support for)\b

hooks.command: echo "[PM Gate] New feature/functionality detected. Before any implementation, the product-manager agent MUST check .ai/MODULE_REGISTRY.md to confirm this doesn't already exist. Invoke: 'Use product-manager to check if [feature] already exists'"
